name: 推理退化指数 Reasoning Degradation
desc: Extreme ratio driven by a near-zero denominator: the agent emitted text only on step 2, then went silent for 24 react steps.

steps.t: Step 2: list_files /workspace, content_len=152 — only early step with text
Steps 3-26: 24 consecutive react nodes all have content_len=0
First-20% (25 react steps) avg content_len = 6.08 (one 152 + 24 zeros)
Step 130: final 3619-char output 'no more eval times left...' content_len=3619
